decision: Project named Mycelium; query language named Hyphae
rationale: Chosen from 8 candidates for evocative wood-wide-web metaphor and self-documenting brand

decision: License is MIT, contributor agreement is DCO
rationale: Maximum permissiveness, no central CLA overhead, fork-friendly forever; cannot be sold to a single company

decision: Tech stack: Rust 2024 + tree-sitter + Salsa + Arrow
rationale: See Charter §3 for full rationale

decision: Hive runs on founder's Mac Pro via launchd, backed by Claude Code Max 20x
rationale: No per-call API cost, no separate server infra; founder retains full physical control

decision: GitFlow adapted from tree-sitter-analyzer with registry-first publish
rationale: Familiar pattern, proven workflow; registry-first prevents partial releases

decision: Language pack hard constraint: 3 files max, 0 core changes
rationale: Forces declarative architecture, enables crowd-sourced language coverage at scale

decision: Hive kill switch is issue #1, target halt latency 60s
rationale: Single point of human override for autonomous activity

decision: Local working directory moved from ~/wiki/mycelium to ~/git-private/mycelium
rationale: Better project home; launchd plists are path-agnostic at install time so no other files need updating

decision: Workspace member crates created: mycelium-core (substantive), mycelium-hyphae/pack/mcp (stubs), mycelium-cli (subcommand skeleton)
rationale: Unblock cargo workspace build; Hive can iterate per-crate without touching workspace plumbing

decision: v0.1 spike of Trunk is HashMap-backed, not radix trie
rationale: Tests pin EXTERNAL semantics; data structure swap to radix trie is a clean follow-up PR with bench deltas. Tracked under RFC-0001 OQ#2.

decision: NodeId is BLAKE3(path) low 64 bits with low 8 bits masked to 0 as reserved shard tag
rationale: RFC-0001 §detailed-design. Stable across runs, 56-bit effective space collision-safe to ~10^8 paths.

decision: TrunkPath separator is '>' and forbids only empty segments + control chars (<0x20)
rationale: Function signatures and generics legitimately contain parens, commas, spaces, unicode; strict validation would lock us out of common qualified-name shapes.

decision: Toolchain updated from 1.79.0 → 1.93.1 (already installed); MSRV set to 1.85 (minimum for edition 2024)
rationale: edition 2024 requires ≥ 1.85; 1.93.1 was already present so no download needed

decision: NodeKind::from_str renamed to try_from_wire to avoid clippy::should_implement_trait
rationale: method named from_str returning Option conflicts with std::str::FromStr convention; try_from_wire is accurate (wire-format deserialization)

decision: path::SEPARATOR and path::parent visibility changed to pub(super); not pub(crate)
rationale: both are only consumed by trunk/mod.rs; pub(super) is the minimum required visibility and avoids unreachable-pub lint

decision: P0 verified: cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo test --all, cargo build --release all green
rationale: spike is build-stable; PR can now be opened to develop

decision: P1: rewrote benches/trunk_lookup.rs as criterion harness (4 groups: upsert/lookup_path/ancestors/descendants at N=1k/10k/100k); added tests/sla_trunk.rs with 2 Charter §2 SLA gates (lookup+ancestors < 5ms on 100k)
rationale: manual bench was not CI-comparable; criterion records baselines and can detect regressions; SLA tests run in normal cargo test so no bench-only CI step needed

decision: P2: added proptest property modules in trunk/tests.rs and synapse/tests.rs covering RFC-0001 §Testing strategy invariants: trunk index consistency after upserts; upsert idempotence; post-remove consistency; synapse forward/reverse symmetry; adjacency add idempotence; remove_node completeness
rationale: property tests catch edge cases exhaustive unit tests miss; proptest already in workspace dev-deps so no new deps needed

decision: git repo initialized (main + develop + feature/RFC-0001-criterion-proptest); initial commit on main contains full workspace scaffold; P1+P2 landed on feature branch
rationale: Charter and GITFLOW require all work in feature branches off develop; local repo was absent at session start

decision: P3: Store module added at crates/mycelium-core/src/store/; wires Trunk+Synapse behind upsert_node/upsert_edge/remove_node/remove_file/lookup/ancestors/descendants/outgoing/incoming; persistence deferred to P4
rationale: RFC-0001 §3 requires a unified Store surface; v0.1 in-memory wiring unblocks CLI and MCP work without requiring the .myc file format

decision: P6: mycelium-pack crate implemented (PackError/PackManifest/Meta/LanguagePack + load/name/extensions); Python language pack added under packs/python/ (pack.toml + queries.scm); 2 tests written TDD-first
rationale: Charter §4 hard constraint (3 files max, zero core changes) validated end-to-end; pack-loader tests confirmed pack loads, extensions present, queries non-empty with @definition captures

decision: feature/RFC-0001-criterion-proptest merged to develop via local BDFL self-review (no GitHub remote exists); quality gates verified before merge
rationale: No GitHub remote yet — PR process physically impossible; all quality gates green (fmt/clippy/test); BDFL override per Charter §5.12; will do proper PR workflow once remote is set up

decision: RFC-0002: Extractor implemented in mycelium-core/src/extractor/; 15 TDD tests; tree-sitter upgraded 0.22→0.25 (grammar language version 15 requirement); tree-sitter-python 0.25 added as dev-dep
rationale: P6 language pack had no way to actually parse files; extractor closes the loop between pack queries and Store population; upgrade was forced by tree-sitter-python 0.25 requiring grammar v15 which tree-sitter 0.22-0.24 don't support

decision: CLI index command implemented in mycelium-cli/src/index.rs; index_path() walks directory with walkdir, filters .py/.pyi, extracts via RFC-0002 Extractor, reports IndexStats; 4 TDD tests; visibility clash resolved with #![allow(unreachable_pub)] in private binary module
rationale: First user-visible feature closing the RFC-0001+0002 stack; unreachable_pub vs redundant_pub_crate lint conflict in binary private modules requires file-level allow or restructuring — chose allow to keep semantic pub clarity

decision: feature/cli-index-command merged to develop via local BDFL self-review; quality gates verified: fmt/clippy -D warnings/test all pass (77 tests); CHANGELOG updated
rationale: No GitHub remote yet — local BDFL override per Charter §5.12; first user-visible feature closing RFC-0001+0002 loop

decision: TypeScript language pack added under packs/typescript/ (pack.toml + queries.scm); tree-sitter-typescript 0.23.2 added as workspace dep; extractor extended to handle generic definition.* captures and class_declaration ancestor nodes; 5 TDD CLI tests added
rationale: TypeScript is the dominant web language; second pack validates pack architecture works without core changes per Charter §4; generic definition.* dispatch opens packs to custom kinds

decision: feature/lang-pack-typescript merged to develop via local BDFL self-review; 82 tests passing; Charter §4 validated (3-file pack, zero core changes)
rationale: No GitHub remote; local BDFL override per Charter §5.12

decision: Rust language pack added under packs/rust/ (pack.toml + queries.scm); tree-sitter-rust 0.24.2 added; extractor build_class_chain extended for impl_item anchor nodes with container_name() helper that strips generics; 3 TDD CLI tests added
rationale: Rust pack enables mycelium to index its own source tree (dogfood); impl_item anchor required new container_name helper since impl uses type field not name field

decision: feature/lang-pack-rust merged to develop; 85 workspace tests passing; mycelium can now index Python/TypeScript/Rust — dogfood ready
rationale: Local BDFL override, no remote

decision: Implement RFC-0004 MCP server: rmcp 1.7 stdio transport, 3 tools (index_workspace/search_symbol/get_ancestors), indexing logic embedded in mycelium-mcp crate, Store extended with search_symbol and ancestors_of_path. Merged to develop.
rationale: MCP server makes Mycelium immediately useful in Claude Code and other AI agents. Embedded indexing in mcp crate avoids architectural dependency inversion (CLI crate should not be a library). Store search/ancestor methods are natural API additions.

decision: Merged RFC-0005: JS pack, get_descendants, MCP server identity fix, languages field, TSX/JSX dispatch
rationale: Fixes post-RFC-0004 issues: wrong server name, missing languages field, no JS support, no descendants traversal. 118 tests passing.
